question: Which language is the most popular in Aruba?
gold_sql: SELECT T2.Language FROM country AS T1 JOIN countrylanguage AS T2 ON T1.Code  =  T2.CountryCode WHERE T1.Name  =  "Aruba" ORDER BY Percentage DESC LIMIT 1
predicted_sql: SELECT T2.attr_8512ae FROM country AS T1 JOIN countrylanguage AS T2 ON T1.symbol = T2.attr_ea549d WHERE T1.identifier = 'Aruba' ORDER BY T2.attr_d1647a DESC LIMIT 1;
raw_response: SELECT T2.attr_8512ae FROM country AS T1 JOIN countrylanguage AS T2 ON T1.symbol = T2.attr_ea549d WHERE T1.identifier = 'Aruba' ORDER BY T2.attr_d1647a DESC LIMIT 1;
